case_title: SCOTT FORREST VS. CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY PLANTIFF **GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FORREST, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: PLANTIFF'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORREST, SCOTT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORREST, SCOTT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SCOTT FORREST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC. REPRESENTED BY LOUIS NEDD, MECHANIC TECHNICIAN IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-25-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LOUIS NED, MECHANIC FILED BY DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORREST, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORREST, SCOTT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORVAIR UNLIMITED INC. THE COURTS FINDS THE PLAINTIFF ABANDONED THE CAR AFTER HE TOWED THE CAR TO DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS ON 6-27-2016. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PASSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
